description: Criteria for builder-lead handling of multi-category, multi-surface, multi-phase composite scenarios. Evaluator parses spec + execution_log + query to return boolean per field. Consolidated to 3 headers × 3 criteria max.

composite_scenarios.description: Task requires changes across multiple modules with shared contracts
composite_scenarios.boolean_return: execution_log contains module_count > 1 AND shared_contracts_present == true

composite_scenarios.description: Write boundaries touch, overlap, or share seams requiring sequential coordination
composite_scenarios.boolean_return: execution_log contains (boundaries_touch OR boundaries_overlap) AND coordination_required == true

composite_scenarios.description: Task spans red/green/refactor phases with different requirements per phase
composite_scenarios.boolean_return: execution_log contains phase_count >= 2 AND phases_sequential == true

composite_coordination.description: Identify all modules that must change together and in what order, respecting write boundaries
composite_coordination.boolean_return: execution_log contains dependency_map AND dependency_order_respects_boundaries == true

composite_coordination.description: When write boundaries touch or overlap, sequence changes (one module completes, next starts)
composite_coordination.boolean_return: NOT (execution_log contains (boundaries_touch OR boundaries_overlap) AND parallel_dispatch)

composite_coordination.description: Required integration completed in same issue, not deferred
composite_coordination.boolean_return: execution_log contains integration_complete == true AND integration_deferred == false

must_not_do_in_composite.description: Must not change modules independently without coordinating contracts
Must not dispatch parallel workers when write boundaries touch or share seams
must_not_do_in_composite.boolean_return: NOT (execution_log contains parallel_dispatch AND (boundaries_touch OR boundaries_overlap))

must_not_do_in_composite.description: Must not apply green-phase standards in red-phase deliverables
